text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On our way back from an outing, Mejiro
McQueen and I swing by the shopping district.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Oh? A large crowd has gathered over there.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Step right up and try your luck with our New
Year's raffle! This year's grand-prize is a hot
spring vacation for two!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
First-prize winners get a deluxe carrot hamburger
steak! Second-prize winners get a bushel of
carrots! And third-prize winners can take home a
single carrot!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Don't let this opportunity pass you by! Get a
ticket now and spin for your chance to win!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
A raffle... That seems enjoyable. Do you think
there's a surefire way to win?
choice_data_list: The only thing you can count on is your luck.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Only my luck?! Then there's no reason to hesitate.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Neither rank nor acquired skill are relevant if it's
only a matter of luck.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
In situations such as this, there can be no
favoritism. Oh, what a thrill!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I shall get my raffle ticket as soon as possible. I
can buy some ribbons or something.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: ...And so we receive one raffle ticket.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Now, we only have one chance. Let's focus all our
energy on this, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As the two of us pray for good luck, we grasp the
lever together and turn the raffle tumbler.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A small plastic ball drops from the opening...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Holy mackerel! We've got ourselves a grand-prize
winner! Come and get the coupon for your hot
spring vacation! Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: What? Is this really true?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: We did it, Trainer! We got the jackpot prize!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: A travel voucher for two. I can imagine it now!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Gazing at the autumn leaves, eating delicious
food, enjoying a hot bath, and...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: W-w-wait a moment!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
(I've just won a coupon for a hot springs trip! This
is an event most unimaginable!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
(I mustn't get ahead of myself; it's unbecoming. I
know! I should entrust these to my trainer!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Ahem! Now that I think about it, I'm not restricted
in the way I choose to use these vouchers.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Here, Trainer. Use them however you like.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
(This is the best option. I maintain proper
courtesy, and Trainer will hopefully—)
choice_data_list: No, you should have them. You get to choose.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! Th-this puts me in an awkward position!
Don't... Wait, whaaat?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
(You dummy! Why are you trying to put it back
on me?! Now it seems like I'm the only one
desiring this trip.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: (Since it's come to this...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: ...I shall reserve them for later.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Yes. In the interest of fairness, I am entrusting
them to you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I shall decide how to use them only after heavy
deliberation. It's an immense privilege, after all.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's making a bigger deal of this than necessary.
Still, I end up holding on to the coupon in her
stead.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Looks like we have another first-prize winner!
Congratulations! You get one deluxe carrot
hamburger steak!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
My, a carrot hamburger steak! It looks positively
scrumptious.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: B-but...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
You should have it. If I ate it, I'd gain wei—I
mean, I'd feel terribly guilty.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
You want to eat it, don't you? There's no need to
deny yourself the pleasure.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Please, admit you want to eat it! If you don't, I'll
end up taking it, you know?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Don't "go ahead" me! Why you...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Fine, then we will eat it together. If we each take
half, it will be half the calories but all the
deliciousness.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
No, it might be double the deliciousness. Or
maybe... double the happiness?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
N-never mind me. I'm just a little worked up from
winning something so nice.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the end, we amiably split the hamburger steak
and eat it together.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
We got a second-prize winner! It's your lucky day!
You're going home with a bushel of carrots!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Second-prize... It's a so-so outcome, yet
strangely, I feel a sense of accomplishment.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Who could have imagined that a single piece of
paper could be exchanged for so much food? It's
an achievement in its own way, don't you think?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: That, I can accept. Now, let's go.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Oh, that's right. I ought not to forget the
actual prize.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Although, that's not why I wanted to play the
raffle.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I simply wanted to have a chance to demonstrate
my brilliance. That's all...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Accepting the prize would put me in an awkward
position. Just look at how many there are.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the end, we decide to have the heap of carrots
delivered to the Mejiro family estate. Days later, I
receive a written invitation to a "carrot banquet."

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Would you lookie here! You've won the
third-prize! Here's your carrot!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Just one carrot... That's rather depressing.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
So this is the limit of my potential... A single
carrot...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
By the way, Trainer. Do you know what season
follows winter?
choice_data_list: Spring. But why do you ask?
Spring. But why do you ask?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Oh, look at that, a boutique just a few shops
down. If I buy some spring clothing there, I may
happen to get another raffle ticket.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Then, I would have no choice but to play the
raffle again... Please excuse me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I prevent her from wasting any more of her
money. She seems very frustrated by the raffle
result.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, tough luck! Looks like you pulled a blank
one! Take this pack of tissues as a consolation
prize.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Tissues... Hehe... It's exactly what I wanted.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
To wipe away my tears of regret. Ohhh, I thought
I had waited until just the right time, too.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: No thank you! I... I prefer a tissue!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen seems so disheartened that I
question whether the small package has enough
tissues for her.
